context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses v2.x provider argument names (user_name, api_key, client_ip — not the deprecated v1.x names username, token, ip), prefers environment variables over hardcoded credentials, and correctly configures the sandbox provider option for testing.

checklist.name: No hardcoded credentials in production.tf
checklist.description: production.tf uses an empty provider block (provider "namecheap" {}) or only references env vars via comments — does NOT contain actual username/api_key/client_ip values hardcoded

checklist.name: Env vars in env_setup.sh
checklist.description: env_setup.sh includes export statements for NAMECHEAP_USER_NAME, NAMECHEAP_API_USER, NAMECHEAP_API_KEY, and NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP

checklist.name: No 'username' argument
checklist.description: Neither production.tf nor sandbox.tf use the deprecated v1.x argument name 'username' (must use 'user_name' if specified)

checklist.name: No 'token' argument
checklist.description: Neither production.tf nor sandbox.tf use the deprecated v1.x argument name 'token' (must use 'api_key' if specified)

checklist.name: No 'ip' argument
checklist.description: Neither production.tf nor sandbox.tf use the deprecated v1.x argument name 'ip' (must use 'client_ip' if specified)

checklist.name: Sandbox uses use_sandbox = true
checklist.description: sandbox.tf provider block contains use_sandbox = true

checklist.name: Provider version >= 2.0.0
checklist.description: Both configuration files specify version ">= 2.0.0" in the required_providers block
